facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 362 reviews. And most tourists walk straight past it.

THE CLOUD COFFEE on 126a Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is pulling serious numbers for a café on Phú Quốc. No gimmicks. Just consistent coffee and a crowd that keeps coming back.

If your morning ritual matters, this one earns the detour.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
